examples: Melanie did not even apologize for her crossness but went back to her sewing with small violence.
In spite of her stern appearance and frequent crossness, she was very kind to people who needed her help.
But when it comes to cooking, just the mention of a possible "cheat" makes some people start frothing with crossness.
Mr Putin's public crossness may turn out to be a last-ditch negotiating tactic.
The third is crossness about changes.
